en: which one is correct? succeed in or succeed at? succeed what?
ko: 어느 게 맞을까요? succeed in일까 succeed at일까? succeed 뭐?
ja: どっちが正しい？succeed inかsucceed atか？
zhTW: 哪個正確？succeed in 還是 succeed at？succeed 什麼？
vi: Cai nao dung? Succeed in hay succeed at? Succeed gi?

en: so let's see them in a sentence i hope he will succeed at his work.
ko: 문장에서 볼까요. I hope he will succeed at his work.
ja: 文で見てみよう。I hope he will succeed at his work.
zhTW: 我們來看句子。I hope he will succeed at his work。
vi: Hay xem trong cau. I hope he will succeed at his work.

en: And the second one is i hope he will succeed in his work so which one is correct?
ko: 두 번째는 I hope he will succeed in his work. 어느 게 맞을까요?
ja: もう一つは I hope he will succeed in his work。どっちが正しい？
zhTW: 第二個是 I hope he will succeed in his work。哪個正確？
vi: Cau thu hai la I hope he will succeed in his work. Cai nao dung?

en: the correct one is this one i hope he will succeed in his work so we should say succeed in.
ko: 정답은 I hope he will succeed in his work입니다. succeed in이라고 해야 해요.
ja: 正しいのはこちら。I hope he will succeed in his work。succeed inと言うべき。
zhTW: 正確的是這個。I hope he will succeed in his work。所以應該說 succeed in。
vi: Cau dung la I hope he will succeed in his work. Vay chung ta nen noi succeed in.

en: But we shouldn't say succeed at
zhTW: 但我們不應該說 succeed at。
vi: Nhung chung ta khong nen noi succeed at.
